title: Game Writing
creator: Chris Bateman, editor
description: A revised collection on the practical craft of writing for games, including interactive structure, dialogue, characters, documentation, voice production, and collaboration with a development team.
useful: It introduces the concrete deliverables and constraints of game writing rather than treating narrative only as plot analysis.
audience: Writers entering game development and teams that need a shared understanding of narrative work.
learning: Plan writing for branching and interactive structures
Collaborate with design, audio, and production roles
